message:
test(ftui-extras): improve filepicker.rs test coverage (bd-2gi6v)

Added 20 new tests (24→44 total) covering:
- FileKind: Debug+Clone+Copy+Eq+Hash
- FileEntry: Debug+Clone+Eq, is_dir for all kinds, default size None
- FilePickerStyle/FilePickerFilter: Debug+Clone+Default
- Filter: directories always pass, extension case-insensitive
- FilePicker: default, Debug+Clone, set_style
- Navigation: page_up from top, page_down clamp, move_to_last empty
- truncate_str: empty string, zero width
- text_width, rebuild_filter clamps selected
- Render: visible_height update, path displayed on first line

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
